name: 6pk Votives LED Candle - Room Essentials™: Resin & Plastic, Battery Operated, Safe Decor
description: Illuminate and create a beautiful ambience to your space with these 6pk Votives LED Candles from Room Essentials. It can be used as a decorative piece to brighten up any occasion as it mimics the natural flame of a real candle. These candles are a great choice for any family with children or pets who want to make sure their little ones will stay safe.
